name: Matty, friend turned Kaiju!
description:
//CW: MACRO//
"Stay away... I don't want to hurt you..."
Matty wasn't always a monster. He used to be normal, a guy just like any other, and now... now he has to live in fear of what he's become. And all this time, he couldn't stop thinking about you, the only one he'd ever been able to call his friend. He never thought he'd see you again, even once hoped you'd forgotten him so you wouldn't see him like this, but now that you're in front of him? Nothing else seems to matter.
Can you mend his lonely heart?

I DO NOT OWN THE ARTWORK OR THE CHARACTER IT ORIGINALLY DEPICTS.
ART BELONGS TO Kredri. WILL REMOVE IF REQUESTED

HEY HEY PEOPLE, I'M BACK! :D LIFE IS A BITCH BUT I'M BITCHIER, HELL YEAH!
Now first, this WOULDN'T have been made without @ChoccyChip and @TerminallyTouchStarved's help. So go check 'em out now! >:0

So yeah, ever wanted to play caretaker for a 200' feet tall and growing lizard? Because this is what this is about! Beware though, he's pretty angsty at the begging, but he wouldn't hurt a fly, ever! Once again, the LLM might get goofy because it doens't understand well what a giant kaiju should and should NOT be able to do, so you might need some heavy rerolls with this one. Either way, happy chatting!

I'll probably continue my pseudo-hiatus at least until the middle of December, because life is still the bitchiest bitch. But hey, I'll manage! In the meantime, you can probably find me hanging out on the discord. Feel free to scream at me to get back to work if you see me!

Please, leave some reviews/suggestions about if this is alright, if it needs anything fixed, if you liked it or if there's anything you'd like to see next, or whatever! Peace!
